node.text:
Discover an instant volume lift that transforms hair at the wash, delivering visibly fuller roots and lasting body with ELVIVE COLLAGEN LIFTER.

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisHaircare #CollagenLifter #BigHairDay

Where volume meets confidence.
ELVIVE COLLAGEN LIFTER, embodied by @kendalljenner.

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisHaircare #CollagenLifter #BigHairDay

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisHaircare #CollagenLifter #BigHairDay

ELVIVE COLLAGEN LIFTER, reflected in @gilliana’s hair.

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisHaircare #CollagenLifter #BigHairDay

node.text:
Celebrating the Year of the Horse through the strength, grace, and spirit of @kendalljenner, @tangyan1206 and @elaine_zhongchuxi. Together with L’Oréal Paris, they mark a moment to reconnect, share love, and welcome abundance in the months ahead.

#LOrealParis #LunarNewYear

node.text:
A journey into the heart of innovation.
Gillian Anderson goes behind the scenes at our Beauty Science Lab to explore the pioneering science that defines L’Oréal Paris. Discover the dedication of the experts who work to empower women everywhere through scientific excellence.
 
#lorealparis #pioneeringscience #lorealparisscience #empoweringbeauty

Introducing the new REVITALIFT TRIPLE LASER ANTI-AGING CREAMY-SERUM, powered by the revolutionary Melasyl. Our most advanced formula, engineered to target wrinkles, dark spots, and dullness at the source.
 
#LOrealParis
#PioneeringScience #lorealparisskincare

node.text:
Experience the energy of our Beauty Science Lab. 
At L’Oréal Paris, science isn’t just studied, it’s lived in every texture, felt in every « tap tap »and experienced in every beauty transformation.
 
#lorealparis #pioneeringscience #lorealparisscience #empoweringbeauty

Your BIG HAIR DAY starts now!
With the new ELVIVE COLLAGEN LIFTER, we have taken the power of collagen peptides to create the ultimate pioneering formula for flat hair.
 
#lorealparis #PioneeringScience #LOrealParisHaircare #CollagenLifter

We are putting the pioneering formula of EXTENSIONIST MASCARA to the test. 
The result? Lashes so extended that they don’t even fit the frame.
 
#Extensionistmascara #LOrealParis #lorealparisscience #lorealparismakeup

node.text:
Tap Tap and flawless.
Discover how INFALLIBLE CUSHION deliver a flawless coverage that lasts up to 24 hours. Experience the technical magic behind a formula that offers a weightless and second-skin finish.

#InfallibleCushionFoundation #LOrealParis #lorealparisscience #lorealparismakeup

Doukissa Nomikou is discovering our 8 vibrant shades of HYALURON TINT. Our new innovation that combines hydration and color that stays for 12 hours, in a weightless formula. 

#lorealparis #pioneeringscience #lorealparismakeup #hyalurontint

node.text:
No need to choose between care and long-lasting color. Get a glimpse at the innovation behind our new HYALURON TINT. Our pioneering formula behaves like a serum, delivering +80% instantly hydrated lips for a plumped, healthy look. 

#lorealparis #lorealparisscience #hyalurontint #lorealparismakeup

Have you ever dreamed of a lip tint that hydrates like a serum?
HYALURON TINT is our first lip innovation that truly behaves like a serum. Infused with hyaluronic acid and glycerin to ensure your lips stay plumped and hydrated while wearing a natural, long-lasting tint.

#LOrealParis #PioneeringScience 
#LOrealParisMakeup #HyaluronTint

node.text:
Witnessing the art of transformative beauty. 
With her keen scientific curiosity, actress Gillian Anderson joins our scientists to discover how pioneering research is shaping the future of L’Oréal Paris innovation.

#lorealparis #pioneeringscience #lorealparisscience #empoweringbeauty

Experience the future of hydration. Our Beauty Science Lab proudly presents REVITALIFT GLASS SKIN, delivering 100 hours of unparalleled glow. 

#LOrealParis  #PioneeringScience  #LOrealParisSkincare  #GlassSkin

node.text:
Experience the power of the « Inside-Out » result. Our latest advancement in Glass Skin technology is designed to penetrate deeply across the different layers of the epidermis.

#LOrealParis  #PioneeringScience  #LOrealParisSkincare  #GlassSkin

Let’s discover the science of extended lashes. EXTENSIONIST MASCARA, an innovation that offers an unparalleled experience of captivating length and definition.
 
#LOrealParis  #PioneeringScience  #LOrealParisMakeup  #ExtensionistMascara

Let’s deep dive into the formula of INFAILLIBLE CUSHION, guided by our experts during the Beauty Science Lab.

#LOrealParis #PioneeringScience #InfalibleCushionFoundation #lorealparismakeup

INFALLIBLE CUSHION brings you weightless, flawless coverage in a sponge. Engineered to mimic your skin’s natural texture, it delivers a breathable finish from morning to night.
 
#LOrealParis #PioneeringScience #LOrealParisMakeup #InfaillibleCushionFoundation

node.text:
Get an exclusive look of our Beauty Science Lab, where we are unveiling the robotic precision behind EXTENSIONIST MASCARA. Experience the pioneering science engineered to lift your lashes +5mm closer to the brows.

#LOrealParis#PioneeringScience #LOrealParisMakeup #ExtensionistMascara

Witnessing the science of transformative beauty.
With her scientific spirit and natural curiosity, actress Gillian Anderson steps inside our labs to explore how pioneering research is shaping the future of L’Oréal Paris innovation. 

#lorealparis #pioneeringscience #lorealparisscience #empoweringbeauty

Ready for volume that doesn’t quit? We’ve taken the power of collagen peptides and brought them to your hair routine with ELVIVE COLLAGEN LIFTER.

#lorealparis #PioneeringScience #LOrealParisHaircare #CollagenLifter

node.text:
On the International Day of Women and Girls in Science, we celebrate the brilliant minds shaping the future of beauty. 
At L’Oréal 68% of our scientists are women and we are proud to support their expertise and leadership. 
Their brilliance and dedication are what make our latest beauty breakthroughs possible. 

#empoweringbeauty #womeninscience #lorealparisscience #worthit

Unveil the science of extreme length. EXTENSIONIST MASCARA is precision-engineered to elevate your lashes, bringing them closer to your brows.

#lorealparis #pioneeringscience #lorealparismakeup #extensionistmascara

Panoramic volume. 1.4x bigger looking eyes, now in colour. 
PANORAMA CHROMATICS worn by @kendalljenner. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisMakeUp #PanoramaMascara

Starting the year with growth and ELVIVE GROWTH BOOSTER SERUM. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisHaircare #ElseveGrowthBooster 

- L'Oréal Paris has been engaged in beauty without animal testing for more than 30 years #ForBeautyWithoutAnimalTesting

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisMakeUp #ExtensionistMascara

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisMakeUp #ExtensionistMascara

node.text:
Lashes take on new heights, meet the new EXTENSIONIST MASCARA .

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisMakeup

90 minutes away from your ultimate glass skin with REVITALIFT HYDROGEL GLOW MASK. Transform your skin with instant & lasting glow.

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisSkincare #RevitaliftGlassSkin

Glass skin revolution now in your hands with the new REVITALIFT GLASS SKIN LIQUID CREAM.
Plump. Glow. Smooth Lines. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisSkincare #RevitaliftGlassSkin 

- L'Oréal Paris has been engaged in beauty without animal testing for more than 30 years #ForBeautyWithoutAnimalTesting

node.text:
You’re just one drop away from Glass Skin. 
New Liquid Cream technology powered by Hyaluronic Acid for 100 hours of glowing hydration, approved by @simoneashley 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisSkincare #RevitaliftGlassSkin

Born from K-Beauty. Powered by L’Oréal Paris Science. The ultimate Glass Skin goal revealed tomorrow. @Nychaa 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisSkincare

The making of @ellefanning’s glam at the Golden Globes 2026: from backstage moments before the red carpet, witness radiance in every frame with L’Oréal Paris. 

Photo: @diggzy 
Makeup: @erinayanianmonroe 
Hair: @justjenda 

#LOrealParis #GoldenGlobes2026

Talented, passionate, and always owning her worth. 

Introducing award-winning actress Serenay Sarıkaya as the new L’Oréal Paris ambassador for Turkey. Welcome to the #LOrealParisFamily @serenayss!

#LOrealParis #WorthIt

Eight expressions of HYALURON TINT - a curated selection of tones, each unique in character. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisMakeup #HyaluronTint #LipTint 

- L'Oréal Paris has been engaged in beauty without animal testing for more than 30 years #ForBeautyWithoutAnimalTesting

NEW HYALURON TINT - a refined spectrum of shades, shifting from subtle to bold. 
Powered by watery fresh pigments & Hyaluronic Acid. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisMakeup #HyaluronTint #LipTint 

- L’Oréal Paris has been engaged in beauty without animal testing for more than 30 years #ForBeautyWithoutAnimalTesting

Watery‑fresh pigments meet Hyaluronic Acid in the NEW HYALURON TINT, for 12h weightless color and +80% hydrated lips. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisMakeup #HyaluronTint #LipTint 

- L'Oréal Paris has been engaged in beauty without animal testing for more than 30 years #ForBeautyWithoutAnimalTesting

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisHaircare #CollagenLifter #BigHairDay

For a big hair day, every day.

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisHaircare #CollagenLifter #BigHairDay
- L'Oréal Paris has been engaged in beauty without animal testing for more than 30 years #ForBeautyWithoutAnimalTesting

node.text:
Choose your holiday alter ego and follow us to see the behind the scenes of our holiday campaign. 

From the L'Oréal Paris Family, we wish you a radiant start to the holiday season. Because You're Worth It! 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisAdventCalendar #LOrealParisHolidays

Vibrant colors or a satin glow, @evalongoria elevates every look with a statement lip with COLOR RICHE lipstick.

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisAdventCalendar #LOrealParisHolidays

Effortless volume that transitions from day to night. @thelumagrothe wears BIG DEAL MASCARA for a feather-soft, clump-free finish. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisAdventCalendar #LOrealParisHolidays

Three ways to make every look yours. @ariana_greenblatt’s picks: INFAILLIBLE MATTE RESISTANCE, PANORAMA MASCARA, and INFAILLIBLE SETTING MIST. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisAdventCalendar #LOrealParisHolidays

Holiday glow, firmness, and radiance. @heidiklum with AGE PERFECT LE DUO SERUM. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisAdventCalendar #LOrealParisHolidays

For every lap of the festive day, @carlossainz55 powers through with MEN EXPERT HYDRA ENERGETIC: VITAMIN C SHOT SERUM, SHOWER GEL, ANTI‑FATIGUE EYE ROLL‑ON, and MOISTURISER. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisAdventCalendar #LOrealParisHolidays

node.text:
Firmness and radiance in every drop - the power of two in AGE PERFECT LE DUO SERUM. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisSkincare #LeDuoSerum 

- L'Oréal Paris has been engaged in beauty without animal testing for more than 30 years #ForBeautyWithoutAnimalTesting

Dinner is served. @evalongoria delivers the season’s most refined course: REVITALIFT LASER TRI-PEPTIDES SERUM. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisAdventCalendar #LOrealParisHolidays

Where radiance meets firmness - dual action, singular elegance. AGE PERFECT LE DUO SERUM. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisSkincare #LeDuoSerum 

- L'Oréal Paris has been engaged in beauty without animal testing for more than 30 years #ForBeautyWithoutAnimalTesting

Le Shadow Sticks meet Panorama Mascaras - unlimited ways to light up your season's looks!

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisMakeup #Panorama #LeShadowStick #Mascara 

- L'Oréal Paris has been engaged in beauty without animal testing for more than 30 years #ForBeautyWithoutAnimalTesting

Holiday glamour, personified. @heidiklum illuminates the moment with luminous skin by AGE PERFECT LE DUO SERUM and a touch of pink with COLOR RICHE. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisAdventCalendar #LOrealParisHolidays

node.text:
Nude shades that last - with Micro‑Keratin care in EXCELLENCE NUDES. You're Worth it! 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisHairColor #Preference

An inside look at the 20th anniversary of L’Oréal Paris Women of Worth program at The Academy Museum of Motion Pictures in Los Angeles, honoring ten non-profit leaders tackling some of the nation’s most pressing issues. 

Learn more at womenofworth.com. 
 
#LOrealParisWomenOfWorth #WorthIt #WomenOfWorthAwards

user.full_name: Hope Booth™ | Making Hope & Help Accessible with Hope The Hippo
Ridges to Riffles Indigenous Conservation Group

node.text:
Born out of the iconic L’Oréal Paris tagline “You’re Worth It”, L’Oréal Paris Women of Worth program celebrates the power of women driving positive change in the community. 

Meet this year’s honorees at the 2025 Women of Worth Awards at The Academy Museum of Motion Pictures in Los Angeles, celebrating its 20th anniversary.
 
#LOrealParisWomenOfWorth #WorthIt #WomenOfWorthAwards

node.text:
Every challenge is a chance to improve. What truly counts is growing from good to better. 
Every challenge is worth it. L’Oréal Men Expert Global Ambassador Xiao Zhan @xz_1991x is ready, are you? 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisFamily #WorthIt #XiaoZhan

L’Oréal Paris welcomes Xiao Zhan @xz_1991x as Global Ambassador for L’Oréal Men Expert. Whether on set or in life, his determination and fearlessness inspire us all. 

Stay tuned. 

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisFamily #WorthIt
#XiaoZhan

#LOrealParis #LOrealParisAdventCalendar #LOrealParisHolidays

Join us to mark this inspiring journey with @kendalljenner @helenmirren @gilliana @ariana_greenblatt Andie MacDowell @ajanaomi_king @heidiklum at the 2025 Women of Worth Awards at The Academy Museum of Motion Pictures in Los Angeles.

#LOrealParisWomenOfWorth #WorthIt #WomenOfWorthAwards
